roles.title: CEO & Owner
roles.description: Co-founder, led intensive project → mastered roadmap creation & objective tracking; gained strong marketing & public speaking skills via client outreach & online video production.

roles.title: Student Job - Logistics Employee
roles.description: Just-in-time order picker → delivered high-quality results under tight deadlines; honed efficiency and reliability in fast-paced environments.

roles.title: AI Project Manager
roles.description: Independently led multiple small-scale AI initiatives to reduce operational costs and increase revenue; designed and implemented automation solutions end-to-end; developed an internal AI assistant to optimize employee scheduling and streamline workforce management.
